ogTitle: Tandur vs Tannum Sands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tandur and Tannum Sands.
heading: Tandur vs Tannum Sands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tandur, Queensland and Tannum Sands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tannum Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tandur (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tandur or Tannum Sands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tandur has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Tannum Sands scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tandur scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Tannum Sands scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tandur or Tannum Sands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tannum Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
